name: Boss
description: The world's most popular pedal brand. Known for bulletproof build quality and consistent tone.

name: Ibanez
description: Home of the legendary Tube Screamer, Ibanez makes some of the most iconic overdrive pedals ever.

name: Electro-Harmonix
description: NYC-based maker of the Big Muff Pi and countless other legendary effects pedals.

name: MXR
description: Classic American pedal brand known for simple, great-sounding effects in compact enclosures.

name: Behringer
description: Budget-friendly pedals that clone classic circuits at a fraction of the price.

name: Joyo
description: Affordable pedals with surprisingly good tone. Great for beginners building their first board.

name: TC Electronic
description: Known for pristine digital effects and the innovative TonePrint technology.

name: Walrus Audio
description: Boutique pedal maker from Oklahoma known for creative designs and premium tone.

name: JHS Pedals
description: Boutique builder known for YouTube education and meticulously crafted effects.

name: Strymon
description: Premium digital effects with studio-quality algorithms. The gold standard for delay and reverb.

name: ProCo
description: Makers of the legendary RAT distortion pedal since 1978.

name: Dunlop
description: Home of the Cry Baby wah and Fuzz Face. Essential effects for every guitarist.

name: EarthQuaker Devices
description: Akron, Ohio boutique maker known for creative, hand-built effects pedals.
